name: Indonesia Energy Corp Ltd
business: Indonesia Energy Corp Ltd is an oil and gas exploration and production company with operations solely in Indonesia. It explores for and produces oil and natural gas from its Kruh Block and Citarum Block. The company sells its production to the Indonesian government and state-owned entities such as Pertamina.

exposures.sentence: Our business focus is on oil and gas exploration in limited areas in Indonesia and exploitation of any significant reserves that are found within our license areas.

catalysts.sentence: However, such drilling plan was rescheduled and the first of the two new wells, K-29, is expected to be spudded in late May 2026.
